response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 20 years of technical breadth and hands-on experience across web, embedded, and infrastructure domains. Recently exposed to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, but lacks the strategic director-level background, demonstrated AI product expertise, and customer-advisory experience required for a principal engineer AI strategy role. Current responsibilities focus on implementation rather than innovation strategy, transformation leadership, or recognized contributions to AI products.
strengths: 20 years of technical experience with impressive breadth across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure—demonstrates strong learning ability and adaptability
Recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq with MCP frameworks and agentic workflows shows current engagement with cutting-edge AI tooling trends
Strong software craftsmanship foundations evident through TDD practices, open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts), and teaching ability via workshops and talks
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (current role only ~1 year); no track record of building or shipping recognized AI products or platforms before 2025
No Master's degree or PhD in AI; title progression (Senior Developer → Staff Developer) indicates senior engineer level, not director-level individual contributor with strategic responsibilities
Resume lacks evidence of strategic advisory work, customer engagement on emerging technologies, or organizational transformation leadership—focuses on hands-on implementation

key_factors.factor: Strategic leadership and AI product experience gap
Recent AI infrastructure exposure and learning agility
Broad technical foundation and software craftsmanship
